## Summary
- What changed and why?

## PR Title
- Format: `feat|bug|chore: <short description>`
- Example: `feat: add newsletter CTA status fallback`

## Linked Linear
- Outcome ticket (optional): `TEAM-123` or URL

## Linked Issue
- Closes #<issue-id> or N/A

## Type of Change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore / Tooling / CI
- [ ] Documentation only

## Scope
- In scope: ...
- Out of scope: ...

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Additional tests/checks: ...
- [ ] Manual smoke checks: ...

## Checklist
- [ ] Breaking change? If yes, document migration notes below.
- [ ] Security impact reviewed.
- [ ] Performance impact reviewed.
- [ ] Docs updated (or not needed).

## Risk and Rollback
- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Main risks: ...
- Rollback plan: Revert commit(s) ...

## Migration Notes (if breaking)
- N/A

## Screenshots / Evidence (if UI change)
- Before:
- After:
